title: Unify feature fetching on TanStack Query cache via fetchQuery
rationale: MapEditor was calling trpc.features.list.query() directly, bypassing the TanStack cache. DrawingToolbar invalidated the cache on mutations but MapEditor never saw the invalidation. Using mapQueryClient.fetchQuery() respects cache staleness: invalidated entries re-fetch, fresh entries return cached. This eliminates the dual-path and makes cache invalidation work correctly without over-engineering (preserves imperative setData for MapLibre).

title: import-engine extraction parsing complete, orchestration diverges
rationale: Parsing layer clean (7 format parsers, pure functions). DB insertion diverges — worker uses raw SQL, web uses Drizzle ORM. Bug fixes must be applied in 2 places until orchestration unified. 8 orphaned deps in web/worker package.json.

content: apps/web/src/routes/api/upload/+server.ts uses Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer()). Replace with Readable.fromWeb(file.stream()).pipe(createWriteStream()).
